title: Chef's Delight - Farmer's Delight Villagers
description:
Add-on for the Farmer's Delight mod. Adds 2 new professions to villagers. Chef and Cook.

Depends on Farmer's Delight.
body:
Add-on for the Farmer's Delight mod. Adds 2 new professions to villagers. Cook and Chef.
Depends on Farmer's Delight for Forge or Fabric.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pvcsfne4/images/fc101fdb2bfba3209057049524ad9f499d7920dc.png)

⚠ Notice: Versions 1.21 and 1.21.1 of this mod require the **Farmer's Delight Refabricated** mod to work properly. Make sure you're using version 1.21.1-3.0.1 or newer. 

Download [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated).

⚠ Notice: Versions prior to 1.21 of this mod use **[Deprecated] Farmer's Delight [Fabric]** as a dependency.
Download [Deprecated Farmer's Delight for Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric).

Download [Farmer's Delight for Forge and NeoForge](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight). 


## Professions:

* Cook - To turn a villager into a Cook, you need a Skillet. The Cook trades simple food.
* Chef - To turn a villager into a Chef, you need a Cooking Pot. The Chef trades advanced foods.

## Structures:

This mod generates structures for villager Chef and Cook in villages.

The default setting for structure generation has been made so that it will not always generate in villages. If you are using other mods that also spawn structures in villages, you may need to increase the generation number of Chef's Delight structures in the config file.

The file is configured in a way that it generates structures randomly and can be different for each biome. 
**Put 0** to not generate the structures. 

🏜️ **NEW: Savanna structures (Chef houses)**  
❄️ **NEW: Snowy structures (Cook houses)**

### Config for Forge:
A configuration file is generated in the Minecraft config folder with the name "**chefsdelight-common.toml**" allowing to change the number of houses that are generated in the villages. (still in test)

### Config for Fabric:
A configuration file is generated in the Minecraft config folder with the name "**chefsdelightconfig.properties**" allowing to change the number of houses that are generated in the villages. (still in test)

### Compatibility Repurposed Structures
* Repurposed Structures Mod - Forge - [Download here](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge)
* Repurposed Structures Mod - Fabric - [Download here](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric)
* Repurposed Structures - Chef's Delight Compat Datapack - [Download here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/repurposed-structures-chefs-delight-compat)

### Compatibility CTOV and Chef's Delight
* ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village (CTOV) - [Download here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
* CTOV - Chef's Delight Compat - [Download here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ctov-chefs-delight-compat)
